questionSet.questionBody: How many different ways can 9 candles be arranged around a circular cake?
A container has 20 liters of a solution containing milk and water in the ratio 4:1. How many liters of milk should be added to make the ratio 3:1?
45 years ago, P's age was one-seventeenth of his present age. What is P's present age?
The product of ages of D and E is 1350. If the ratio of their ages is 3:5, what is E's age?
The average age of a group of 5 students is 20 years. If the age of the teacher is included, the average increases by 5 years. What is the age of the teacher?
60 years ago, Z's age was one-twenty-seventh of his present age. What is Z's present age?
How many different pairs of earrings can be chosen from a collection of 6 pairs?
A grocer blends two types of sugar, one costing $3/kg and the other $4/kg, to make a mixture worth $3.50/kg. What is the ratio in which the two types of sugar are mixed?
A solution contains 20% alcohol. How many liters of pure alcohol should be added to 10 liters of the solution to make it a 50% alcohol solution?
